main-title: More control. Fewer cigarettes. Your pace.
main-app-description: QYSH helps you understand, reduce and achieve your goal – with clear statistics, smart timers and seamless device integration.
motivation-description: Reducing smoking isn't easy – but it's achievable with the right tool. QYSH offers you clear data, motivating statistics and smart timers so you reach your goal without losing track.
card-countdown-description: See exactly when the next session is, how many you've had today, and what limit applies.
card-statistic-description: Interactive diagrams for day, month, and year – including averages and costs.
card-goals-description: Reduction plan with automatic intervals or fixed daily limits – you set the pace.
card-notifications-description: Notifications at timer end, daily limit, and daily summary.
function-countdown-description: Today's sessions, daily limit, last session timestamp, and countdown to the next one. Quick entry – even retroactively.
function-statistic-description: Day/Month/Year overview, scrollable charts, averages, cost calculation, and list of today's sessions (incl. deletion).
function-settings-description: Reduction plan, fixed limits with automatic intervals, notifications, design.
function-widgets-description: All widget types, Lock Screen live timer, device widget with battery status – information at a glance.
function-watch-description: Countdown, daily limit, last session, entry button, device overview with charging status – right on your wrist.
widgets-title: Always informed – without opening the app
widgets-description: Home Screen and device widgets, and Watch OS/Wear OS widgets keep your progress right at your fingertips.
widget-actual-description: Daily stats & countdown at a glance.
widget-watch-description: Countdown & device charging status right on your wrist.
integrations-description: Monitor and control compatible IQOS devices through QYSH.
integration-notifications: Notifications: not in charger, connection lost, battery low/full
privacy-user-data: This app collects no user data.
privacy-update: This policy will be updated if the app's privacy practices change.
download-title: Ready to take the first step?
download-description: Download QYSH and start your personal plan today.
faq-question-plan: How do I set my daily limit or reduction plan?
faq-answer-plan: When you first start the app, you'll be asked whether you want to use a fixed limit or a reduction plan. You can change this anytime in the Countdown settings. There, you define how many sessions per day you want and whether this number should automatically decrease over time.
faq-question-costs: How does the app track my spending?
faq-answer-costs: To calculate your costs, you need to enter the price per pack and quantity per pack in the Statistics settings. Afterward, you'll see your daily, monthly, or yearly spending in the Statistics view.
faq-question-manual-input: How do I select an exact time for a session?
faq-answer-manual-input: Press and hold the '+' button. This opens a menu where you can select an exact time for the session.
faq-question-background: Does the app need to run in the background?
faq-answer-background: Yes, the app should not be fully closed so it can continue communicating with your connected devices in the background.
faq-question-device-widget: What does automatic device selection in the Device Widget mean?
faq-answer-device-widget: If active, the widget always displays the most recently used device.
faq-question-device-battery-low: Should I let my IQOS device discharge completely?
faq-answer-device-battery-low: No, that is not recommended. If the battery is completely drained, the connection may be lost.
faq-question-connection-issue: What should I do if my device is disconnected?
faq-answer-connection-issue: If the connection fails even after automatic reconnection attempts, turn the device off and on again.
faq-question-watch-companion: Does the Watch OS/Wear OS app work without the iOS/Android app?
faq-answer-watch-companion: No, the Watch OS/Wear OS app requires an active connection to the iOS/Android app to display data and device information.
faq-question-device-settings: When can I change my IQOS device settings?
faq-answer-device-settings: Device settings can only be changed when the device is connected and the Holder is inside the charging case (except for IQOS ILUMA ONE).
faq-question-background-task: What is the background process for?
faq-answer-background-task: The background process generates a daily summary of your sessions for the previous day.
faq-answer-double-session-recognition: For IQOS devices, this feature automatically adds all sessions once the Holder is recharged in the charging case.
faq-question-privacy: What data does the app collect?
faq-answer-privacy: The app only stores the information you enter. No personal data is sent to third parties or stored on servers.
